summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Graupner Suite carpentry management software. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (30/30 tests). Frontend testing showed excellent functionality with German UI, working authentication, navigation, and business workflows. Minor playwright script issues with form field selectors but underlying functionality is solid.

design_issues.issue: Unit field appears to be a dropdown instead of text input as expected by test script
design_issues.note: Form appears to work correctly from UI perspective, issue is with test script selector assumptions

passed_tests: Dashboard statistics display (customers: 1, quotes: 1, orders: 0, invoices: 0)
Customer CRUD operations including create, read, update, delete
Article CRUD operations with proper API responses
Quote creation with VAT calculations and PDF generation
Order creation from quotes with automatic numbering
Invoice creation with due dates and mark as paid functionality
PDF generation for quotes, orders, and invoices
Navigation between all modules (Dashboard, Kunden, Angebote, Aufträge, Rechnungen, Artikel, Einstellungen)
Sample data visibility (Hans Müller customer, A-2026-0001 quote)
Modal dialogs and forms opening correctly
